title: Linde plc (LIN) CEO Sanjiv Lamba on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Start Time: 09:00 January 1, 0000 10:04 AM ET Linde plc (NYSE:LIN ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022, 09:00 AM ET Company Participants Sanjiv Lamba - CEO Matthew White - EVP and CFO Juan Pelaez - Head of IR Conference Call Participants Duffy Fischer - Goldman Sachs Vincent Andrews - Morgan Stanley Nicola Tang - Exane BNP Paribas Michael Leithead - Barclays John McNulty - BMO Capital Markets Jeff Zekauskas - JPMorgan John Roberts - Credit Suisse Peter Clark - Société Générale Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho David Begleiter - Deutsche Bank Kevin McCarthy - Vertical Research Partners Operator Good day and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Linde plc Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Teleconference.

title: Linde (LIN) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat on Higher Pricing
text: Increased prices and volumes from electronics, energy and chemicals end markets aid Linde's (LIN) Q2 earnings.

title: Linde Reports Second-Quarter 2022 Results (Earnings Release Tables Attached)
text: Sales $8.5 billion, up 12% versus prior-year quarter Operating profit $0.6 billion; adjusted operating profit $2.0 billion, up 8% Operating profit margin 7.0%; adjusted operating profit margin 23.5%, up 100 basis points ex. cost pass-through EPS $0.74; adjusted EPS $3.10, up 15% Operating cash flow of $2.1 billion, up 17% versus prior-year quarter Increased full-year 2022 adjusted EPS guidance to $11.73 - $11.93, represents 10% to 12% growth year-over-year, 15% to 17% ex.

title: 7 Large-Cap Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: Following this year's sell-off, seasoned investors are increasingly hunting for large-cap stocks to buy on the dip. For instance, the S&P 500 index and Dow Jones Industrial Average have lost 185 and 13% so far in 2022.

title: Linde Publishes 2021 Sustainable Development Report
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / July 27, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) today announced it has published its 2021 Sustainable Development Report. The 2021 Sustainable Development Report provides an update on Linde's progress towards its sustainability targets, including the ambitious "35 by 35" target to reduce absolute greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions 35% by 2035, compared to the 2021 base.

title: Linde Declares Dividend in Third Quarter 2022
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / July 25, 2022 / Linde plc (NYSE:LIN; FWB:LIN) announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.17 per share. The dividend is payable on September 16, 2022 to shareholders of record on September 2, 2022.

title: SLB vs. LIN: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: SLB vs. LIN: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Linde Signs Agreement to Supply High-Purity Industrial Gases to PT Freeport Indonesia
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / July 20, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) today announced it has signed a long-term agreement to supply high-purity industrial gases to PT Freeport Indonesia, a leading mining company in Indonesia. Linde will build, own and operate an air separation unit (ASU) to supply oxygen and nitrogen to PT Freeport Indonesia's new copper smelter and refinery in Manyar, Indonesia.

title: Can Linde (LIN) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Linde (LIN) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Linde Included in FTSE4Good Index for Seventh Consecutive Year
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / July 14, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN; FWB:LIN) today announced it has been included in the FTSE4Good Index for the seventh consecutive year. The FTSE4Good Index Series is a tool for investors seeking to invest in companies that demonstrate strong environmental, social and governance (ESG) practices measured against international standards.

title: Linde Announces Second Quarter 2022 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / July 7, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, July 28, 2022, at 06:00 EDT/midday CEST. The Company will host and webcast its conference call at 09:00 EDT/15:00 CEST, which will be available to the public and the media in listen-only mode.
